message:
feat: split conversations by logical day boundary for summarization

Rewrite groupSessionsByDateAndProject to parse per-message timestamps
and split conversations at the dayStartHour boundary (default 5 AM).
A session running from 10pm to 2am now contributes messages to the
correct logical date instead of lumping everything under started_at.

Add splitConversationByDay helper that parses **Speaker (YYYY-MM-DD
HH:MM):** format and groups lines by logicalDate. Old-format timestamps
without dates fall back to the session's started_at date.

Move NOT EXISTS filtering from SQL to TypeScript so it operates on
logical dates rather than calendar dates. filterDate now also checks
against logical dates.
